name: ai-slop
description: An Agent Skill that catches AI slop in any prose, adding conventions for empirical software engineering papers and mechanics for LaTeX source (BibTeX, reference checks, citation macros, grounding comments) when you target a manuscript or .tex paper. Fetches the live AI-trope catalog from tropes.fyi at invocation.

plugins.name: ai-slop
plugins.description: Catch AI slop and apply writing conventions to any prose — drafting Markdown, documentation, or a blog post — and add empirical software engineering paper rules plus LaTeX checks (BibTeX, reference verification) when editing .tex files or auditing a manuscript for AI slop. Combines these with the community-maintained tropes.fyi catalog of general AI writing patterns.
